## Summary

Describe the behavior change and why it belongs in this PR.

## Verification

- [ ] `./scripts/dev-check`
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] `meminit check --format json`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Release Surface

- [ ] Tests updated or not needed
- [ ] Docs updated or not needed
- [ ] Security/privacy impact considered
- [ ] Meminit-governed docs updated when behavior, architecture, or process changed

## Notes

Link related GitHub Issues or Meminit document IDs.
